description_long: This object is a classic regulatory stop sign, featuring an octagonal red sign face with a bold white border and the word 'STOP' in uppercase white letters. The sign is mounted on a tall, cylindrical metal pole, which is dark in color and appears sturdy. The red surface of the sign is slightly textured, suggesting a reflective coating for visibility in low light. The rear of the sign shows the mounting brackets and the reverse side of the sign face, which is less detailed and lacks text. The pole is ribbed for structural strength and is likely made of galvanized steel. This stop sign is designed for installation at road intersections to control vehicle and pedestrian traffic.
description: A red octagonal stop sign with white text and border, mounted on a tall, dark metal pole. The sign is reflective and designed for roadside use.
description_view_0: The front view shows the red octagonal sign face with white 'STOP' text and border, mounted on a vertical pole.
description_view_1: A side view of the pole, showing its cylindrical, ribbed structure with no visible sign face.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the octagonal sign and the mounting brackets, with no visible text.
description_view_3: Another side view of the pole, similar to view 1, with the sign face edge barely visible.
